message:
refactor: Continue clippy compliance across service and sync modules

Additional code quality improvements:

- runtime/state.rs: Simplify state management
- service/retry.rs: Improve retry policy handling
- service/service.rs: Clean up service trait implementations
- stream/mod.rs: Minor formatting
- sync/pool.rs: Improve pool lifecycle management
- test_utils.rs: Extract test helpers
- types/rref.rs: Add documentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
